title: Support SVA goto repetition [->N] in concurrent assertions

features.name: goto repetition in assert property with overlapping implication
features.description: Code should include an assert property with goto repetition [->N] using overlapping implication |->
features.snippet:
logic clk, req, ack;
assert property (@(posedge clk) req[->2] |-> ack);

features.name: goto repetition with non-overlapping implication
features.description: Code should include an assert property with goto repetition [->N] using non-overlapping implication |=>
features.snippet:
logic clk, req, ack;
assert property (@(posedge clk) req[->2] |=> ack);

features.name: goto repetition with count N=1
features.description: Code should include an assert property with goto repetition [->1]
features.snippet:
logic clk, req, ack;
assert property (@(posedge clk) req[->1] |-> ack);

features.name: goto repetition with count N=3
features.description: Code should include an assert property with goto repetition [->3]
features.snippet:
logic clk, req, ack;
assert property (@(posedge clk) req[->3] |-> ack);

features.name: goto repetition in sequence expression
features.description: Code should include a sequence definition with goto repetition [->N]

features.name: goto repetition with non-constant count error
features.description: Code should include a goto repetition [->N] with non-constant count expression to test error handling

features.name: goto repetition with zero count error
features.description: Code should include a goto repetition [->0] to test zero count error handling
features.snippet:
logic clk, req, ack;
assert property (@(posedge clk) req[->0] |-> ack);
